daily.today_energy: Your aura's glowing with creative restlessness today, Leo. There's a magnetic pull toward trying something new—trust that vibe. The universe is basically saying 'go for it,' so lean into whatever's been calling to you.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift, whether you realize it or not. If you're coupled up, this is prime time for deeper convos. Single? That confidence you're radiating is literally doing the work for you. Stay authentic.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today—people are actually listening. Channel that into pitching something you've been sitting on or leveling up a current project. Your leadership energy is unmatched rn.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and play, not punishment. Do something that feels good rather than obligatory—dancing, walking, whatever makes you feel alive. Rest when you need it without the guilt.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is inviting you to step into your power without apologizing for it. Venus is dancing in your favor, so lean into authentic self-expression. Trust the timing of your life—everything's aligning beautifully behind the scenes.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a magnetic pull happening. If you're taken, deeper conversations are flowing naturally. Single? Someone's definitely noticing your glow. Either way, be honest about what you actually want instead of performing.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the moment to share that project you've been sitting on or ask for what you deserve. Your confidence is contagious—use it strategically. The universe is supporting bold moves, not timid ones.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dancing, walking, stretching—anything that brings joy counts. Energy-wise, you're vibrant but might feel slightly scattered midweek. Ground yourself with intention and rest when needed.
